plugins.name: flush
plugins.description: Flush changes through the full pipeline — error docs, GitHub issue, conventional commit, push/PR

plugins.name: architect-advisor
plugins.description: Senior AI architect & PM advisor — 4-phase engineering workflow with trilingual term glossary

plugins.name: my-utils
plugins.description: Utility slash commands — daily scrum, doc sync, translations, screenshots, Notion logging, AI builder digest

plugins.name: e2e-testing
plugins.description: Playwright E2E testing patterns — POM, fixtures, CI/CD, flaky test handling. Borrowed from ECC.

plugins.name: browser-qa
plugins.description: AI-driven post-deploy QA via browser automation. Borrowed from ECC.

plugins.name: roundtable
plugins.description: Multi-persona PRD/spec/RFC roundtable — 4-6 personas (PM·CTO·Growth backbone + 1-2 domain + optional CSO/Designer/CEO triggers) in 3-round deliberation with category-driven plan-verify

plugins.name: should-i-use
plugins.description: Structured first-look evaluation of external tools against a user persona — 8-section report with a one-word verdict
